items.raw_excerpt: A new study by the Danish Midwives Association has shown that 36 percent of midwives who graduated in 2019 and 2020 have already left the profession.
items.summary_en: A new study found that 36 percent of Danish midwives who graduated in 2019 and 2020 have already left the profession. The Danish Midwives Association conducted the research.
items.summary_ko: 덴마크 조산사협회의 새로운 연구에 따르면 2019년과 2020년에 졸업한 조산사 중 36%가 이미 업계를 떠난 것으로 나타났다. 이는 조산사 직업의 지속 가능성에 대한 우려를 제기한다.
items.title_en: Many Danish midwives leave the profession a few years after graduation
items.title_ko: 덴마크 조산사들, 졸업 후 몇 년 만에 직업을 떠나는 경우 많아
items.title_original: Many Danish midwives leave the profession a few years after graduation

items.raw_excerpt: People living at a homeless hotspot in Wagga were given until today to move on, but some say they still have nowhere to go.
items.summary_en: Homeless people at Wilks Park in Wagga Wagga were ordered to leave by today. Some say they still have nowhere else to go.
items.summary_ko: 와가와가 윌크스 파크에 있는 노숙자들이 오늘까지 캠프를 떠나라는 명령을 받았다. 일부는 여전히 갈 곳이 없다고 말한다.
items.title_en: Deadline passes for homeless camp eviction in Wagga Wagga
items.title_ko: 와가와가 노숙자 캠프 퇴거 시한 도래
items.title_original: Deadline arrives for homeless to leave campsite

items.raw_excerpt: What does an astronaut do for an encore? Teach, write or enter politics — to name a few options.
items.summary_en: A CBC article explores what Canadian astronauts do after retiring from space. Teaching, writing, and entering politics are common second careers. Jeremy Hansen will soon make this transition.
items.summary_ko: CBC 기사가 캐나다 우주비행사들이 은퇴 후 어떤 길을 가는지 조명한다. 교사, 작가, 정치 입문이 흔한 차선택이며 제레미 한슨도 곧 이 전환을 앞두고 있다.
items.title_en: Canadian Astronauts Face Life After Space
items.title_ko: 캐나다 우주비행사들이 우주 이후 맞이할 삶
items.title_original: Life after space is a journey all astronauts must figure out — and Jeremy Hansen's up next

items.raw_excerpt: Massamagrell abrirá gratuitamente su piscina municipal durante los días 6, 7 y 8 de julio ante el aviso especial por ola de calor y el nivel de riesgo naranja...
items.summary_en: Massamagrell, a small town in Valencia, will open its municipal pool for free on July 6-8 due to an extreme heat warning. The town is acting as a climate refuge for residents during the orange-level heat risk.
items.summary_ko: 발렌시아의 작은 마을 마사마그렐이 폭염 특보 발령에 따라 7월 6~8일 공공수영장을 무료 개방한다. 주황색 경보 수준의 무더위 속에서 마을이 기후 피난처 역할을 자처한 것이다.
items.title_en: Spanish town opens free public pool as heatwave shelter
items.title_ko: 스페인 작은 마을, 폭염 대비 무료 공공수영장 개방
items.title_original: Un pueblo de Valencia se convierte en refugio climático ante la ola de calor y abre gratis su piscina municipal - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: From friendly locals to a creative atmosphere and great train connections, there's more to Germany's fourth-largest city than Carnival - although the annual celebration is not to be missed - writes former Cologne resident Amy Brooke.
items.summary_en: A former resident shares six things she misses about living in Cologne, Germany. The list includes friendly people, a creative atmosphere, good train connections, and the famous Carnival celebration. The article shows what makes this city feel like home to locals.
items.summary_ko: 쾰른에 살았던 한 주민이 이 도시에서 그리운 여섯 가지를 회고한다. 친근한 사람들, 창의적인 분위기, 편리한 기차 연결, 그리고 놓쳐서는 안 될 카니발 축제가 포함됐다. 이 글은 쾰른을 살기 좋은 도시로 만드는 요소들을 보여준다.
items.title_en: Six things I miss about living in Cologne
items.title_ko: 쾰른에서 살며 그리운 여섯 가지
items.title_original: Six things I miss about living in Cologne

items.raw_excerpt: Four parties have agreed to form a city government to run The Hague, nearly four months after the local elections in March. The coalition will be led by Hart voor Den Haag (HvDH), the right-wing populist party led by Richard de Mos, with the right-wing liberal VVD, the Christian Democrats (CDA) and left-wing Denk as junior partners. HvDH became the largest party at the local elections, winning 16 of the 45 seats on the council. De Mos hoped initially to...
items.summary_en: Four political parties agreed to form a coalition government for The Hague, nearly four months after March's local elections. The right-wing populist Hart voor Den Haag will lead with the VVD, Christian Democrats and Denk as junior partners.
items.summary_ko: 3월 지방선거 약 4개월 만에 헤이그 시정부를 구성할 4당 연정이 합의됐다. 우익 포퓰리스트 정당인 Hart voor Den Haag가 VVD, 기독민주당, Denk와 연정을 이끌게 된다.
items.title_en: Four-party coalition to run The Hague after local elections
items.title_ko: 헤이그 시정부 구성, 4당 연정 합의
items.title_original: Four-party coalition led by De Mos agrees deal to run The Hague

items.raw_excerpt: Five co-owners of an Adelaide Plains piggery are collectively accused of ill-treating their animals, including allegedly failing to ensure the animals had "adequate and appropriate living conditions".
items.summary_en: Five co-owners of an Adelaide Plains piggery are accused of animal cruelty. They allegedly failed to give their pigs adequate living conditions. The case is now in court.
items.summary_ko: 애들레이드 평원의 한 양돈장 공동 소유주 5명이 동물 학대 혐의로 법정에 섰다. 검찰은 이들이 돼지에게 적절한 생활 환경을 제공하지 않은 것으로 보고 있다.
items.title_en: Piggery owners face court over animal cruelty charges
items.title_ko: "대변과 오줌, 흙범벅"… 애들레이드 평원 양돈장 동물학대 혐의 법정행
items.title_original: 'Faeces, urine and dirt': Piggery owners in court on animal cruelty charges

items.raw_excerpt: An alleged victim who bought a lot to co-own a coffee vending machine testified on how he never got any returns and was grilled by the accused.
items.summary_en: A man who bought a share in a coffee vending machine told a court he never got any profit and felt threatened by the seller, Raymond Ng. Ng denied the claims and said the man was lying.
items.summary_ko: 커피 자판기 지분을 산 남성이 법정에서 수익을 한 푼도 못 받았고 판매자 레이먼드 응에게 협박당했다고 증언했다. 응은 이를 부인하며 피해자가 거짓말을 하고 있다고 주장했다.
items.title_en: Man says he was cheated in coffee vending machine deal
items.title_ko: 커피 자판기 공동투자 사기 피해자 법정 증언
items.title_original: Man testifies he felt cheated, intimidated by Raymond Ng in vending machine case; Ng says he's lying

items.raw_excerpt: Are you wondering how your local French beach or lake ranks in terms of its water quality? This interactive map allows you to see in real time, as well as to check past reports.
items.summary_en: An interactive map lets you check real-time water quality at beaches and lakes across France. You can also view past water quality reports.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스 전역 해변과 호수의 실시간 수질을 확인할 수 있는 대화형 지도가 공개됐습니다. 과거 수질 보고서도 함께 조회할 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Interactive map shows water quality at French beaches and lakes
items.title_ko: 프랑스 해변과 호수의 수질을 실시간으로 확인하는 지도
items.title_original: MAP: How to check if the bathing water in France's seas and lakes is safe

items.raw_excerpt: Sempere, municipio de alrededor de 29 habitantes, continúa avanzando en un modelo de desarrollo sostenible basado en la mejora de los servicios, la recuperación del patrimonio y la puesta en valor de su entorno natur...
items.summary_en: Sempere, a village of about 29 people in Valencia, Spain, is starting to gain new residents. Visitors arrive, fall in love with the landscape, and decide to stay. The town continues advancing a sustainable development model based on better services, heritage recovery, and natural environment restoration.
items.summary_ko: 스페인 발렌시아의 인구 약 29명 마을 셈페레가 새 주민을 얻기 시작했다. 방문객들이 풍경에 반해 정착하기로 결정하면서, 마을은 서비스 개선, 유산 복원, 자연환경 복원을 기반으로 한 지속 가능한 발전 모델을 계속 추진하고 있다.
items.title_en: Spain's most depopulated village starts gaining new residents
items.title_ko: 스페인에서 가장 인구가 적은 마을, 새로운 주민이 늘기 시작하다
items.title_original: El pueblo más despoblado de Valencia empieza a ganar vecinos: “Llegan, ven el paisaje y deciden quedarse” - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: If the summer heat is making you lose your appetite, these delicious Spanish food and drink specialties will help fill you up whilst keeping you cool. ¡Buen provecho! (Enjoy your meal).
items.summary_en: Spanish food and drink specialties can help you stay cool during summer heat. These local dishes refresh you while filling you up. Enjoy your meal with these traditional options.
items.summary_ko: 스페인의 여름 별미들은 더위에 지친 입맛을 살리면서도 몸을 시원하게 해준다. 전통 음식과 음료로 더운 날씨에도 든든하게 한 끼를 즐길 수 있다.
items.title_en: Best Spanish summer foods and drinks to keep you cool
items.title_ko: 더운 여름을 시원하게 보내는 스페인 음식과 음료
items.title_original: The best Spanish food and drink to keep you cool during the summer heat

items.raw_excerpt: Traffic congestion near Sarath City Capital Mall causes long delays, prompting authorities to propose solutions like an underpass and skywalk.
items.summary_en: Heavy traffic near Sarath City Capital Mall in Hyderabad is causing long delays for motorists. Local officials propose building an underpass and skywalk to fix the bottleneck on the Gachibowli-Miyapur corridor.
items.summary_ko: 하이데라바드 사라스 시티 캐피털 몰 인근 도로가 극심한 교통 혼잡으로 몸살을 앓고 있다. 지역 당국은 가치볼리-미야푸르 구간의 병목 현상을 해소하기 위해 지하차도와 보행육교 설치를 추진 중이다.
items.title_en: Traffic jam near Sarath City Capital Mall leaves drivers stuck for hours
items.title_ko: 사라스 시티 캐피털 몰 앞 교통 체증, 운전자들 장시간 갇혀
items.title_original: Traffic bottleneck outside Sarath City Capital Mall leaves motorists stranded for hours on Gachibowli–Miyapur corridor; underpass, skywalk pitched

items.raw_excerpt: The career conversion programmes come with up to 90 per cent of salary support, said Senior Minister of State for Transport Sun Xueling.
items.summary_en: Singapore is helping taxi and private-hire drivers learn new skills as self-driving cars change the industry. The government offers career conversion programmes with up to 90 percent salary support and S$1,600 in training incentives.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 정부가 자율주행차 도입에 대비해 택시·통합호출 차량 기사들의 직무 전환을 지원한다. 최대 90%의 급여 지원과 1,600싱가포르달러의 훈련 인센티브를 제공하는 전직 프로그램을 운영한다.
items.title_en: Singapore offers retraining for taxi drivers as autonomous vehicles arrive
items.title_ko: 자율주행차 시대 대비, 싱가포르 택시기사 재교육 지원
items.title_original: Career conversion programmes, up to S$1,600 in training incentives to help taxi, private-hire drivers amid AV transition

items.raw_excerpt: This French expression doesn't actually mean you're growing any sort of wings.
items.summary_en: This French expression doesn't actually mean you are growing wings. It describes feeling so confident and inspired that you can take on anything. The phrase literally translates to 'feeling yourself grow wings.'
items.summary_ko: 이 프랑스어 표현은 말 그대로 '날개가 돋는 기분'이라는 뜻이다. 실제로 날개가 자라는 게 아니라 자신감과 영감으로 가득 차 무엇이든 해낼 수 있는 느낌을 나타낸다.
items.title_en: French expression 'se sentir pousser des ailes' means feeling empowered
items.title_ko: 프랑스어 표현 'se sentir pousser des ailes' — 날개 돋친 기분
items.title_original: French Expression of the Day: Se sentir pousser des ailes

items.raw_excerpt: A 2026 law now actively discourages the use of AC in new residential and commercial buildings in France. So how are the country's new builds being kept cool? And is it really the best approach?
items.summary_en: A 2026 law makes it hard to install AC in new French homes and offices. Builders use shade, thick walls, and natural airflow instead. The goal is to save energy and fight climate change.
items.summary_ko: 2026년부터 프랑스는 신축 주택과 사무실에 에어컨 설치를 제한한다. 대신 건물은 차양과 두꺼운 벽, 자연 환기로 시원함을 유지하도록 설계된다. 목표는 에너지 절약과 탄소 배출 감소다.
items.title_en: France's new buildings have no air conditioning
items.title_ko: 프랑스 새 건물엔 에어컨이 없다
items.title_original: Why France's new buildings are designed not to have air conditioning

items.raw_excerpt: The High Court has directed the Deputy Town Planner to file an affidavit explaining why a court-ordered site inspection at Anjuna was not conducted for nearly
items.summary_en: The Goa High Court has ordered a deputy town planner to explain why a court-ordered site inspection at Anjuna was not completed. The court also told the local panchayat to take action on illegal structures in the area.
items.summary_ko: 고아 고등법원이 안주나 지역 법원 명령 현장 조사가 진행되지 않은 이유에 대해 부도시계획관의 설명을 요구했다. 법원은 또한 지역 판차야트에 불법 건축물에 대한 조치를 취하도록 지시했다.
items.title_en: Goa High Court Questions Delay in Anjuna Site Inspection
items.title_ko: 고아 고등법원, 안주나 현장 조사 지연에 해명 요구
items.title_original: Goa High Court Seeks Explanation Over Delay in Anjuna Site Inspection, Orders Panchayat to Act on Illegal Structures - heraldgoa.in

items.raw_excerpt: These 12 most captivating towns in Victoria offer visitors access to scenery that captures the imagination and is sure to bring them back year after year.
items.summary_en: A list of 12 small towns in Victoria, Australia with beautiful scenery. These charming places attract visitors year after year.
items.summary_ko: 호주 빅토리아주의 아름다운 풍경을 자랑하는 작은 마을 12곳을 소개합니다. 이 매력적인 장소들은 해마다 방문객을 다시 찾게 만듭니다.
items.title_en: 12 Most Captivating Small Towns In Victoria
items.title_ko: 빅토리아주에서 가장 매력적인 작은 마을 12곳
items.title_original: 12 Of The Most Captivating Small Towns In Victoria - WorldAtlas

items.raw_excerpt: If there's one thing Swedes can't get enough of in summer, it's these.
items.summary_en: The Swedish word 'jordgubbe' means strawberry. Swedes love eating fresh strawberries during the summer season. It is a beloved summer treat across the country.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴어 'jordgubbe'는 딸기라는 뜻이다. 여름이면 스웨덴 사람들은 신선한 딸기를 즐겨 먹는다. 전국에서 사랑받는 여름 간식이다.
items.title_en: Swedish word of the day: jordgubbe
items.title_ko: 오늘의 스웨덴어: jordgubbe
items.title_original: Swedish word of the day: jordgubbe

items.raw_excerpt: If you're thinking of making a dignified exit, today's word might come in handy.
items.summary_en: This Danish phrase means to make a dignified exit or pull out of a situation. Danes use it in politics, sports, and daily life.
items.summary_ko: 이 덴마크어 표현은 품위 있는 퇴장이나 상황에서 물러서는 것을 뜻한다. 덴마크인들은 정치, 스포츠, 일상에서 두루 쓴다.
items.title_en: Danish expression: 'At trække si' means to withdraw
items.title_ko: 덴마크어 표현 'At trække sig' — 품위 있게 물러나다
items.title_original: Danish expression of the day: At trække sig

items.raw_excerpt: Benirredrà ya cuenta oficialmente con una bandera municipal. La Vicepresidencia Segunda y Conselleria de Presidencia ha publicado en el Diari Oficial de la Generalitat Valenciana (DOGV)...
items.summary_en: Benirredrà, a town in Valencia, now has an official municipal flag. The regional government published the approval in the official gazette. The flag features a grill and three thistles.
items.summary_ko: 발렌시아의 작은 마을 베니레다가 공식 시 깃발을 갖게 되었다. 지역 정부가 관보에 승인을 게재했다. 깃발에는 그릴과 엉겅퀴 세 송이가 그려져 있다.
items.title_en: A small Spanish town gets its own official flag
items.title_ko: 스페인의 작은 마을, 공식 깃발을 얻다
items.title_original: Una parrilla y tres cardos: Un pueblo de Valencia consigue tener su propia bandera - elperiodic.com
